allusions.translator_note: ``The voice of the highest poet'' is Cicero's standard formula for Ennius. The reconciliation of M. Lepidus and M. Fulvius Nobilior on the day of their election to the censorship was treated by Ennius (himself a client of M. Fulvius) at length in the Annales; the fragment is collected by Skutsch among the certae sed incertae sedis.
